Price below session open = bearish intraday control. NY AM Kill Zone NOT YET ACTIVE (current 10:33 UTC, KZ starts 12:30 UTC). No M15 OB formed yet. WAIT for Kill Zone entry — monitor 30,000 psychological level for potential purge + reversal.
